notes: Real-service smoke cannot run because IMAGE_RETRIEVAL_REAL_SMOKE=1 is not set and all required credential env vars (SERPAPI_API_KEY, QWEN_API_TOKEN) are absent. All release gates (RSV-001 through MVP-005) remain open. This smoke report is diagnostic evidence only — it does NOT prove full v1.1 expected-target completion. Local deterministic tests (284 passing) provide comprehensive coverage of all PRD AC-001 through AC-019 with fixture-mode evidence. Real-service evidence must be obtained in an environment where all prerequisites are satisfied before v1.1 expected-target completion can be claimed.
